summary: FieldFlow Pro Elite v4.0 Phase 1 testing completed successfully. All 23 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Admin Command Center fully functional with real-time metrics, fraud detection, worker performance scoring, and inactive workers panel.

issues: Minor React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> in worker rankings table - does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: All Phase 1 v4.0 Intelligence APIs implemented correctly with proper RBAC (admin-only access)
Worker performance scoring algorithm working correctly with 5 weighted components
Fraud detection engine detecting DUPLICATE_MOBILE alerts correctly
Real-time metrics updating correctly with live data
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from v3.0 testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: v4.0 Phase 1 features fully tested. Intelligence APIs: realtime-metrics, worker-scores, fraud-alerts, inactive-workers, area-intelligence all working. Admin Command Center dashboard shows all 8 real-time metric cards, fraud alerts panel with resolve/dismiss buttons, inactive workers panel with resolve button, and worker performance rankings table with scores and grades. Fraud scan trigger working. RBAC enforced - workers cannot access intelligence APIs except their own score.

features_tested.realtime_metrics_api: GET /api/intelligence/realtime-metrics - returns live_sales_today, live_revenue_today, active_workers_now, total_punched_in_today, inactive_worker_alerts, fraud_alerts_active, pending_expenses, encashments_today
features_tested.worker_scores_api: GET /api/intelligence/worker-scores - returns list of workers with scores 0-100, grades A+ to F, sorted by score descending
features_tested.individual_worker_score: GET /api/intelligence/worker-scores/{worker_id} - workers can view own score, cannot view others
features_tested.fraud_alerts_api: GET /api/intelligence/fraud-alerts - returns active/resolved/dismissed alerts with severity levels
features_tested.fraud_scan_trigger: POST /api/intelligence/scan-fraud - triggers fraud detection scan for DUPLICATE_MOBILE and HIGH_EXPENSE_RATIO
features_tested.inactive_workers_api: GET /api/intelligence/inactive-workers - returns workers with active inactivity alerts
features_tested.area_intelligence_api: GET /api/intelligence/area-intelligence - returns sales_by_city, sales_by_state, campaign_by_geography, top_areas
features_tested.admin_command_center_ui: Dashboard shows all Phase 1 panels: real-time metrics cards, fraud alerts panel, inactive workers panel, worker performance rankings

mocked_apis.OTP_verification: POST /api/coupons/request-otp returns mock_otp in response for testing (from v3.0)

performance_scoring_algorithm.sales_per_day_score: 25% weight - avg sales per active day

fraud_detection_types.DUPLICATE_MOBILE: Same mobile used 3+ times across coupons
fraud_detection_types.GPS_CLUSTERING: 5+ sales from same GPS location in 20 mins (created during sale)
fraud_detection_types.IMPOSSIBLE_TRAVEL: GPS jump >50km in <10 mins (created during sale)
